Class Vault

java.lang.Object
iu.client.Vault
All Implemented Interfaces:
IuVault
public final class Vault extends Object implements IuVault
Provides access to secrets stored in HashiCorp Vault.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface IuVault

    RUNTIME

    • isConfigured

      public static boolean isConfigured()
      Determines if the IuVault.RUNTIME is configured and will be non-null.
      Returns:
      true if IuVault.RUNTIME is configured; else false
